text_excerpt: Contact | Alan Mak Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Alan Residents' Survey News Contact Contact Leave this field blank Postal Address Alan Mak MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA www.AlanMak.org.uk/Contact Find Alan on Facebook Find Alan on Twitter/X Find Alan on Instagram Share your views with Alan To see the Privacy Notice for the Office of Alan Mak MP please visit alanmak.org.uk/PrivacyNotice. This can also be found on the drop down menu on the left hand side of this page. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy When you press submit, you will receive an automatic confirmation e-mail. Please ensure that you read it. Please note I am not able to provide medical, financial or legal advice. The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
